summary: Iter 10 — Sunday Rhythm Review frontend + integration testing. /review page renders correctly with featured 'This week's reflection' card, all 5 stat tiles (workouts/journal/focus/slips/plan for week 2026-04-27), and the 'Rewrite it' button (since current week's review exists). Clicking Rewrite triggers POST /api/ai/sunday-review?regenerate=true → 200, list refreshes, and 'Reflection rewritten.' toast appears. Backend smoke-tested via curl: GET /api/sunday-reviews → 200 (list sorted desc), GET /api/sunday-reviews/latest → 200 with full payload, POST /api/ai/sunday-review with empty body {} → 200 (Pydantic happy on no-body). Sidebar nav-review (BookOpen 'Sunday Review') and MobileNav mobile-nav-week ('Week') both present. Today dashboard regression clean: echo-yesterday + card-daily-brief render. Sunday banner appears as expected (browser day-of-week is Sunday in test env, 2026-05-03), and the gating useEffect guards with `if (new Date().getDay() !== 0) return;` so it correctly hides on non-Sundays.
critical_code_review_comments: Review.jsx week-Monday calc uses local Date with toISOString().slice(0,10) which can shift by one day for users in negative-UTC offsets near midnight (e.g., UTC-5 at 23:30 local Sunday will compute Monday in UTC). Backend computes monday in UTC, so frontend's `hasCurrent` may briefly disagree with backend's upsert key for users east/west of UTC at week boundary. Low-impact for single-user app but worth noting.
Today.jsx Sunday banner gating is local-day-based (new Date().getDay()===0), while the backend's _week_bounds is UTC-based. Same TZ-skew note as above; not a bug given single-user scope.

Review.jsx ReviewCard featured branch hardcodes `open=featured` but uses `useState(featured)` once — fine. Past reviews start collapsed; toggle test path verified by selectors but no past reviews exist in seeded DB to exercise it.
sunday_review.py /sunday-reviews list returns up to 60 — reasonable for ~1yr of weekly cadence; no pagination needed.
Empty-body POST to /ai/sunday-review works because the route uses a query param (regenerate) and no Pydantic body model, so Pydantic never tries to validate the empty JSON. Confirmed via curl.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (page load, featured card, all 5 stat tiles, regenerate flow with toast, sidebar + mobile nav links, Today regression, Sunday banner gate)

seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded review for week_start=2026-04-27. The Rewrite-it click did upsert/replace that same record (confirmed by 200 + toast).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Sunday Rhythm Review surfaces are green. To exercise past-review toggle (data-testid=toggle-{week_start}) and Earlier-weeks list rendering, seed a 2nd weekly_reviews doc with week_start before 2026-04-27. Browser clock in preview env appears to be ~2026-05-03 (Sunday), which is why the Today sunday-banner is visible — that is correct behavior. To test non-Sunday hiding, set page.evaluate to override Date or wait for a non-Sunday in the preview env clock.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in iter10 scope.
